title: ChaosNats
description: NATS subjects owned by dd-chaos-rs. Cluster chaos-engineering loops: pod kills, deployment replica jitter, and NATS latency probing, with every fault recorded as an auditable experiment.

$dd:nats.summary: Chaos experiment records, per-fault lifecycle events, and a request/reply latency-probe subject.

subjects.name: ChaosExperiments
subjects.description: Auditable chaos experiment records: each planned or executed fault (pod-kill, replica-jitter) is published here with its blast radius, target, and dry-run flag.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.chaos.experiments

subjects.name: ChaosEvents
subjects.description: Per-fault lifecycle events (selected, injected, restored, aborted-by-guard) emitted by the chaos loops.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.chaos.events

subjects.name: ChaosProbe
subjects.description: Round-trip latency-probe subject. The chaos NATS probe publishes a ping and the same service replies, measuring request/reply RTT and jitter against the live cluster NATS server.
subjects.subject: dd.remote.chaos.probe
